'''Tajis Durmin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Death Star Trooper/Legends|Death Star trooper]] who was stationed on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he guarded the [[Death Star conference room/Legends|Death Star conference room]] and was among the Imperials when [[Siward Cass/Legends|Siward Cass]] reported the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. He was killed when the station was destroyed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
